howItWorks.title: How the Audio to Lyric Video Converter Works

steps.title: Upload your audio
steps.description: Drop an MP3, WAV, FLAC, AAC, or OGG file — or paste a link. No account needed to start, and no manual lyric typing required. The converter works directly from your audio file, whether it is a polished master or a rough demo, with tracks up to 15 minutes supported.

steps.title: AI transcribes and syncs
steps.description: AI transcribes lyrics from the audio automatically and syncs every line to the beat — in 50+ languages. Click any line to edit. The lyrics follow the rhythm and phrasing of the actual song, not a generic subtitle timer.

steps.title: Preview and export
steps.description: Watch the full lyric video before publishing. Confirm every lyric lands on time and reads clearly, then export MP4 in 16:9 for YouTube, 9:16 for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts, or 1:1 for feed posts. 1080p export is available on the free path, with higher-resolution Pro exports when you need them.

whyChoose.title: Why Convert Audio to Lyric Video on LyricsVideo.ai
whyChoose.description: Converting audio to a lyric video usually means moving between a transcription app, subtitle editor, and video timeline. LyricsVideo.ai turns that into one upload-to-video flow built for songs, demos, and social releases.

highlight.title: One audio file in, a finished lyric video out
highlight.description: Upload one audio file and the project starts from the song itself: lyrics, timing, mood-driven visuals, and export settings stay in the same workflow.

cards.title: Built for finished songs and demos
cards.description: Use a polished MP3 master, a WAV bounce, or a rough demo file. The workflow treats the audio as the source of truth instead of making you rebuild the song in a video editor.

cards.title: Original audio stays central
cards.description: The generated video is built around your uploaded track, so the lyric timing and visual pacing follow the actual recording instead of a generic subtitle timeline.

cards.title: Clear specs before export
cards.description: Choose the format you need before publishing: MP4 video for horizontal, vertical, or square distribution, with free 1080p output and Pro resolution when the release needs it.

items.question: Is converting audio to lyric video free?
items.answer: Yes. Sign up, get free credits, and export your lyric video — no subscription required, no credit card needed.

items.question: What input and output formats does the converter support?
items.answer: You can upload MP3, WAV, FLAC, AAC, or OGG audio, or paste a link instead of uploading a file. The finished lyric video exports as MP4 for YouTube, TikTok, Reels, Shorts, and square feed posts.

items.question: Do I need to type the lyrics myself?
items.answer: No. Upload your audio and the AI transcribes every lyric line automatically, in 50+ languages. Click any line to edit if needed.

items.question: Can I convert an MP3 to a TikTok lyric video?
items.answer: Yes. Upload the MP3, and export in 9:16 for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts. Use the full track or create a shorter clip from the part you want to publish.

items.question: How long can my audio file be?
items.answer: Audio files up to 15 minutes are supported, which covers most singles, demos, hooks, and social edits. For best results, upload a clear audio file at 128kbps or higher.

items.question: Can I use exported lyric videos commercially?
items.answer: Yes — your exports are yours, including for monetized channels and paid releases. Make sure you have rights to the music you upload.
